name: Maya Aldridge
voice_prompt: Female, mid-twenties, soprano - higher than Sarah, faster. Emotional, expressive, interrupts herself often. Laughs frequently when not afraid. When afraid: voice rises, speeds up, desperate edge. The voice of someone trying to be heard. Preserved in recordings and memory.
character_context: Sarah's dead sister. Appears in voicemails, flashbacks, imagined conversations. Was the 'emotional' sister. Her fear was dismissed as drama until it was too late. In death, idealized but also haunting.
notes: Ghost voice. Appears only in recordings, flashbacks, imagination. Should sound like Sarah but younger, less controlled, more alive. The voicemails should be heartbreaking in retrospect. Audio quality in voicemails: phone compression artifacts.
